name: [Senate Majority Update] (via 314 Action Team)
subject: McConnell's majority is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Remember, Mitch McConnell is in a virtual tie with Amy McGrath. _We have a real chance to defeat him in 2020._

**But that 's not our only chance to send him packing. _We can take away his Senate majority too!_** [All we need from you is to give $10 right now to our Senate Battleground Fund»»](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+All+we+need+from+you+is+to+give+ask+righ&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_90DO_191215_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_90DO_191215_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_90DO_191215_1_1")

**Here are the facts:**
* In Kentucky, Amy McGrath is **tied** with Mitch McConnell.
* In Arizona, Mark Kelly is **statistically tied** with Martha McSally.
* In Colorado, John Hickenlooper is **up 13%** against Cory Gardner.
* In Maine, Susan Collins' favorability is **just 41%** (we can defeat her too!)

_We CAN defeat McConnell 's Senate Majority_ -- but we need your help.

**LEFT TO GO: $33,982**
[ _**Help us close the gap! >>**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3cd/3d199a51/2f261c4e/7364e6b9/633280373/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191215?refcode=kme191215_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") [_**This grassroots team 's engagement has blown us away! If we keep this up we know we'll reach this critical campaign milestone. Rush in a contribution before the filing deadline ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3cd/3d199a51/2f261c4e/7364e6b9/633280373/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191215?refcode=kme191215_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") All eyes are on NC-06. This race is a 2020 battleground district, and there are plenty of contenders looking to jump in. subject: Will you personally endorse Michael?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |

| Team Bennet,

Michael finished the first leg of his 50 town hall push in New Hampshire earlier this week.

So far, he's done 13 out of the 50 town halls that he committed to hold in the final 10 weeks before primary day.

Some pundits called him a long shot because he's not a celebrity politician, but the energy at his events is electric!

By meeting the vast majority of undecided voters where they are and building a grassroots coalition for change, Michael continues to prove the doubters and talking heads wrong!

[We know the best way to win this election is by bringing people together. That's why we're gathering a list of personal endorsements to show the true strength of this campaign, and it would mean a lot if you added your name.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba901/134673f2/9211c41/69978d29/2931870279/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/endorse-michael?source=EM_PET_B3_121519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Every American child deserves a great public education.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| My plan would ensure educational opportunity for every child in this country. Team, When I was just a baby, my parents fought very hard to move my family into a neighborhood with good public schools, which in the 1960s were often in all-white neighborhoods. It was in that town where I grew up and benefited from a world-class education, which set me on a trajectory my parents and grandparents could have only dreamed for me -- first to college, then a Rhodes scholarship, law school, and eventually elected to serve the people of Newark and New Jersey. **Fifty years later, access to a high-quality public education still too often depends on the zip code a child lives in, the color of their skin, and the size of his or her family 's bank account.** I'm fighting to change that. My education plan calls for a high-quality public school in every community and opportunity for every child -- regardless of where they grow up. **[I hope you'll stand with me in advocating for our public schools to have the resources they need. If you want a president who will invest in our children's futures, add your name here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-education-policy?source=em_pet_20191215_CB_20191215-pet-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here's what my public education plan calls for:
1. Making our school financing system more equitable by dramatically increasing funding for low-income schools.
2. Giving teachers a raise by passing the RAISE Act, which would provide a refundable tax credit for all public school teachers of up to $10,000.
3. Investing at least $200 billion in school infrastructure to ensure that all schools are in good condition and able to provide an education that prepares all students for success in the 21st-century economy.

I'm also proposing that we work towards improving the diversity of our educator workforce, expanding access to quality preschool education, and supporting high-quality public charter schools as a strategy to meet the needs of all students. **[Sign your name if you agree that it's time to raise teacher salaries and increase funding for our public schools.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-education-policy?source=em_pet_20191215_CB_20191215-pet-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Every American child deserves a great public education. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-education-policy?source=em_pet_20191215_CB_20191215-pet-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c9823/880175471/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c9822/880175471/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c9821/880175471/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c9820/880175471/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c982f/880175471/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c01/5fca0d19/785ac07d/291c9823/880175471/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Tina Smith
subject: Something has happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I know messages like these can be a bit pesky sometimes, but they make a huge difference for our team. I'll tell you why.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191215-pesky?refcode=em191215-pesky&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team,

I know messages like these can be a bit pesky sometimes, but they make a huge difference for our team. Here's why:

Every survey you fill out allows us to build a campaign around our shared values. Every petition you sign sends a powerful message. And most importantly, every dollar you give helps our team make sure we have the resources to win re-election and keep Minnesota blue in 2020.

But something has happened in the last few days. According to my finance and digital staffers, fewer people are opening these messages or making donations to our campaign over the last 48 hours.

I don't want to alarm you, but that's a serious problem for our campaign -- especially with President Trump making his way back to Minnesota at any moment. And the truth is, my right-wing opponent can count on outside special interests to win, but I refuse to play that game. I want to win the right way.

So, if we're going to hold our own in the final weeks before the most important FEC deadline of the year, we need to catch up on our goals -- quickly. And if we're going to do that it's going to come from messages like these, because I am never going to beg special interests to cut me a big check.

**Do you think you could add a contribution of $10 or more right now as part of our emergency push to get our grassroots fundraising back on track before the FEC deadline? I need your help more than ever.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191215-pesky?refcode=em191215-pesky&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We're at a major crossroads:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We can make it if everyone pitches in

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4780%2E377263%2EHef7fu) Yang Gang --

I didn’t start this campaign because I ever dreamed of being president. I started this campaign because I’m a husband, a father, and a patriot. I started this campaign because I saw a lack of humanity in America’s laws and policies that affect us every single day.

I’m not running for president because I’m a hero -- I’m running for president because I’m human.

And that’s why I promised to lead with Humanity First values -- and I have every intention of keeping that promise. But without your help, I may not get the chance.

Our campaign is at a crossroads. If we meet our $2 million goal by midnight tonight, we can move forward, more motivated than ever to make sure our government puts Humanity First. If not, we will fall short when it matters most.

[Yang Gang, I want to keep fighting for you. Can you fight for me right now by donating $10 or more?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19897?t=8&akid=4780%2E377263%2EHef7fu) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19897?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4780%2E377263%2EHef7fu)

We’ve come too far to give up now.

clean_body: We can make it if everyone pitches in | Yang Gang -- I didn’t start this campaign because I ever dreamed of being president. I started this campaign because I’m a husband, a father, and a patriot. I started this campaign because I saw a lack of humanity in America’s laws and policies that affect us every single day. I’m not running for president because I’m a hero -- I’m running for president because I’m human. And that’s why I promised to lead with Humanity First values -- and I have every intention of keeping that promise. But without your help, I may not get the chance. Our campaign is at a crossroads. If we meet our $2 million goal by midnight tonight, we can move forward, more motivated than ever to make sure our government puts Humanity First. If not, we will fall short when it matters most. Now, they know that he is one of the most vulnerable Members of Congress in the entire country, so they’re starting their 2020 efforts early. **In fact, they’ve already donated over $100,000 to his campaign.**

**These outside groups bought him a seat in Congress -- and they want to make sure he keeps it so he can continue to push for their destructive, right-wing policies in Washington.**

It comes as no surprise that groups like Club for Growth are so invested in keeping Scott Perry around. Their own endorsement praises him for being the most far-right member of the Pennsylvania U.S. House delegation. **They’re willing to pour money into this race to protect their right-wing agenda in Congress, even if it hurts families in PA.**

[**Last fundraising quarter, Eugene was able to outraise Scott Perry thanks to the strength of this network of grassroots supporters. name: Dean Browning
subject: Fellow Patriot,are you ready for Christmas?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and you are gearing up for a very Merry Christmas. I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you during the Holiday season and talk about the upcoming election in 2020.
Campaigns are not easy. Nor is being a publicly elected official; whether it is local city council or the United States Congress, it takes a lot of hard work and courage to be a public servant.
I want you to know that when I was a Lehigh County Commissioner, I worked overtime to ensure we had a vibrant economy where anyone who was willing to work hard could succeed.
I want to take that work effort and bring it to the U.S. Congress.
I want Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to be the best place in American to live and raise a family.
I also want the United States to remain a beacon of hope and prosperity to those abroad.
Being a public servant is one of the gratifying and rewarding job this country can offer. Unfortunately, campaigning is the most difficult aspect of becoming a public servant. I am sure you know that the upcoming Congressional race is going to be extremely competitive. I already have two Republican challengers for the primary plus incumbent Representative Susan Wild in the general.
[Please help me in this effort. A contribution of $25, or even $10, will go miles in helping my campaign be victorious in November 2020. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9qOAKFsi2F5XTst6kM2kQz2DgcvZEGTPqHSgP6MWG1il2amXZcbdnW_neF8hSm8r4_AOT0v6M1TCSWLzK6RJo9vh7VxOwfiAADDaQK7Fx0qLrVsxbPgDL6Q5y8l-t7l9x0mQQxuSPNUGt5Pu_XPKmll89FSZ0lvb_BqMwySkkGGXaXTVmQRjA==&c=zeQzYzv6gcsnHfGcmFLVKXTBm7fCviOUHcLVgrPnkcMNDrYq1ffzvA==&ch=bxTUIpKEC9QrDlVuzDt4mK2jvHvNTmJyxHwpWONeBSb0afCbSyHA9Q==)
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9qOAKFsi2F5XTst6kM2kQz2DgcvZEGTPqHSgP6MWG1il2amXZcbdnW_neF8hSm8r4_AOT0v6M1TCSWLzK6RJo9vh7VxOwfiAADDaQK7Fx0qLrVsxbPgDL6Q5y8l-t7l9x0mQQxuSPNUGt5Pu_XPKmll89FSZ0lvb_BqMwySkkGGXaXTVmQRjA==&c=zeQzYzv6gcsnHfGcmFLVKXTBm7fCviOUHcLVgrPnkcMNDrYq1ffzvA==&ch=bxTUIpKEC9QrDlVuzDt4mK2jvHvNTmJyxHwpWONeBSb0afCbSyHA9Q==)
---
| The job of campaigning is not easy and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself. While Rep. Wild may receive thousands in donations from outside the Lehigh Valley, my campaign is run off small dollar, local donations averaging less than $100.
That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district. Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests.
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9qOAKFsi2F5XTst6kM2kQz2DgcvZEGTPqHSgP6MWG1il2amXZcbdnW_neF8hSm8r4_AOT0v6M1TCSWLzK6RJo9vh7VxOwfiAADDaQK7Fx0qLrVsxbPgDL6Q5y8l-t7l9x0mQQxuSPNUGt5Pu_XPKmll89FSZ0lvb_BqMwySkkGGXaXTVmQRjA==&c=zeQzYzv6gcsnHfGcmFLVKXTBm7fCviOUHcLVgrPnkcMNDrYq1ffzvA==&ch=bxTUIpKEC9QrDlVuzDt4mK2jvHvNTmJyxHwpWONeBSb0afCbSyHA9Q==)
---
| Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win.
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S - Have you seen Rep. Susan Wild's support for this bogus impeachment? We need to vote her out in November!
[Please consider donating just $25 to help support my campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9qOAKFsi2F5XTst6kM2kQz2DgcvZEGTPqHSgP6MWG1il2amXZcbdnW_neF8hSm8r4_AOT0v6M1TCSWLzK6RJo9vh7VxOwfiAADDaQK7Fx0qLrVsxbPgDL6Q5y8l-t7l9x0mQQxuSPNUGt5Pu_XPKmll89FSZ0lvb_BqMwySkkGGXaXTVmQRjA==&c=zeQzYzv6gcsnHfGcmFLVKXTBm7fCviOUHcLVgrPnkcMNDrYq1ffzvA==&ch=bxTUIpKEC9QrDlVuzDt4mK2jvHvNTmJyxHwpWONeBSb0afCbSyHA9Q==)
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9qOAKFsi2F5XTst6kM2kQz2DgcvZEGTPqHSgP6MWG1il2amXZcbdnW_neF8hSm8r4_AOT0v6M1TCSWLzK6RJo9vh7VxOwfiAADDaQK7Fx0qLrVsxbPgDL6Q5y8l-t7l9x0mQQxuSPNUGt5Pu_XPKmll89FSZ0lvb_BqMwySkkGGXaXTVmQRjA==&c=zeQzYzv6gcsnHfGcmFLVKXTBm7fCviOUHcLVgrPnkcMNDrYq1ffzvA==&ch=bxTUIpKEC9QrDlVuzDt4mK2jvHvNTmJyxHwpWONeBSb0afCbSyHA9Q==)

I already have two Republican challengers for the primary plus incumbent Representative Susan Wild in the general. == | | | == | The job of campaigning is not easy and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself. While Rep. Wild may receive thousands in donations from outside the Lehigh Valley, my campaign is run off small dollar, local donations averaging less than $100. That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district. Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests. | | | == | Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win. | For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S - Have you seen Rep. Susan Wild's support for this bogus impeachment? We need to vote her out in November! == | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. Congress Street, Allentown, PA 18104 | | Sent by mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com in collaboration with |

name: Stephen Stepanek
subject: are you kidding me?
body:
Dear Derek, I can’t believe this just happened. New Hampshire voters sent Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster to Washington DC to represent NH values. Instead they decided to fail New Hampshire by siding with the Washington DC Democratic elites Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff. _Your_ representatives just announced that they will **impeach** President Trump **instead of doing their job.** It is clear to me that Congressman Pappas and Congresswoman Kuster are in Washington DC in order to undo the 2016 elections. That is why your support for the NHGOP is critical. We must send representatives to D.C. that will stand with our President by lowering taxes, cutting regulation, and creating jobs. Stand with the NHGOP by supporting our efforts to send true NH Representatives to Congress next year by [donating $20.20.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzEyMjY5NjE0MDI1MDIwODk4JmM9ZDR6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDI0NTk5MjgmZD1oMXg4eDVx.Rr9KO7Z_BDCSdRSchabSuhlNRTivECEOEJDjqsOY7dk) The path for Republicans to take back the United States House of Representatives runs right through NH. Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff want nothing more than to silence us from supporting our President - and Pappas and Kuster are just pawns in the game. I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy.

So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. And I'm not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

You'll always know that I'm fighting for you -- not for any powerful special interest with deep pockets.

But our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After the end of this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in the past three months and how many people have chipped in to own a piece of our campaign.

**Look, I'll just be blunt: We need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible, and we're behind where we want to be to hit our fundraising goals.**

[**So I'm asking: Will you pitch in $2 or whatever you can today to help grow our campaign?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b3a2/45c30650/113206521/66fb6113/2792772551/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY0Rl9FR1JfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTEyMTZfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM64F_EGR_NFF_E_20191216_V1S3_P")

>
When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn.

But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own.

I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $3 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country.

[**That comes down to hitting this powerfully important mid-month goal before our next FEC fundraising deadline. Time's running short. If you can, please make a contribution today -- I'll be deeply grateful.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b3a2/45c30650/113206521/66fb6113/2792772551/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY0Rl9FR1JfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTEyMTZfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM64F_EGR_NFF_E_20191216_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy. So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if... | | | "" I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy. So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. And I'm not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You'll always know that I'm fighting for you -- not for any powerful special interest with deep pockets. But our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After the end of this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in the past three months and how many people have chipped in to own a piece of our campaign. Look, I'll just be blunt: We need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible, and we're behind where we want to be to hit our fundraising goals. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn. But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own. I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $3 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way. If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected. We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

| Friend,

Happy holidays from the campaign trail! It has been an amazing few weeks with agriculture conventions all over the state. I'm proud to have made it to the Farmer's Union, Farm Bureau, Grain Growers, Stock Growers, and MT Cattlemen's conventions. Ranching is my background and we need a fighter to give Montana a bright and prosperous future. Please, help the campaign close out strong and raise $10,000 before the end of the year to put us in the best possible spot to win in 2020. Montana needs a __born and raised__ Montana voice with experience in __agriculture__ , __military__ , __international humanitiarian crises__ , and our __energy sector__. No other candidate campaigning for Montana's US House of Representative's seat is as qualified with firsthand experiences.

[Can you chip in $5, $25, $50, or anything you can today to help us meet our goal this quarter? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12928662/133611264/-971702669?refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190926-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMxNDljZS0zODIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RbdP3PaRB1ftrFLvoQvf3260hqJqGm26OVxePkONvc=) | | | [SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12928663/133611265/-971702669?refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190926-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMxNDljZS0zODIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RbdP3PaRB1ftrFLvoQvf3260hqJqGm26OVxePkONvc=)
---
I wanted to take a moment to explain why it’s so important we hit our goals this quarter:
* Our race was named one of the most competitive in the country. Outside special interest groups will be pouring money into our state, and it’s important that our grassroots campaign stays competitive.
* Our campaign relies on the help of our amazing grassroots supporters to visit voters across Montana and get our message out.
* Our fundraising this quarter will set the tone of the campaign moving into the winter months. I need your help to get us to the top of the first hill and position this Democrat to keep the success going!

[Friend, as you can see, it’s crucial that we hit our goal of $10,000 by the end of this quarter. Can I count on your support? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12928664/133611266/-971702669?refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190926-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMxNDljZS0zODIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RbdP3PaRB1ftrFLvoQvf3260hqJqGm26OVxePkONvc=)

Please, help the campaign close out strong and raise $10,000 before the end of the year to put us in the best possible spot to win in 2020. Montana needs a born and raised Montana voice with experience in agriculture , military , international humanitiarian crises , and our energy sector. No other candidate campaigning for Montana's US House of Representative's seat is as qualified with firsthand experiences. = | | | = I wanted to take a moment to explain why it’s so important we hit our goals this quarter: Our race was named one of the most competitive in the country. Outside special interest groups will be pouring money into our state, and it’s important that our grassroots campaign stays competitive. Our campaign relies on the help of our amazing grassroots supporters to visit voters across Montana and get our message out. Our fundraising this quarter will set the tone of the campaign moving into the winter months. I need your help to get us to the top of the first hill and position this Democrat to keep the success going! = | | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, = Matt Rains Democrat for Congress = Paid for by Rains for Montana Rains for Montana PO Box 1710 Great Falls, MT 59403-1710 United States

name: Cory Booker
subject: This isn't about my ego or pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| My entire career, I've worked to bring people together to take on our toughest challenges -- that's why I'm running for president. Friend, My entire career, I've worked to bring people together to take on our toughest challenges -- that's why I'm running for president. You won't see me on the debate stage this week, but this fight is far from over. In spite of what some of the polls say, we're actually on the upswing, gaining ground every day. **In fact, my team tells me that if we can raise another $800,000 by the end of the year, we 'll have our best fundraising quarter of the campaign.** **[So I'm asking you to make a donation right now and help show the world that this campaign isn't done growing yet.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191216_CB_20191216-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This isn't about my ego or pride. This is about who's the best candidate not only to take on Donald Trump and win but to bring our country together and solve some of the biggest problems we face. From the imminent threat of climate change to the racial injustice in our criminal justice system to the reproductive rights of millions of people, there is so much on the line in this election -- and I'm in this race because I believe I'm the best candidate to beat Trump and lead our nation to higher ground. But I'm under no illusions that I can do this alone. I'm going to need the help of all of you. **[Please, chip in right now to help us reach our $800,000 goal and build the ground game we need to compete and win.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191216_CB_20191216-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191216_CB_20191216-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9888/46633724/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9897/46633724/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9896/46633724/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9895/46633724/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9894/46633724/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c00/5fca0d19/785df3a4/291c9888/46633724/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: No time to hit the brakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

My team emailed you on Friday that we’re trying to get Sioux City Sue, our campaign RV, back on the road.

The response has been fantastic -- we’re so close to getting the funds we need to fix Sue and get back on the road to talk to the people of Iowa’s 4th district.

**[Can you chip in $5 or more right now to help us meet our goal and get back out there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932273/133643152/-690034814?refcode=em19_191216_midmonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932274/133643154/-690034814?refcode=em19_191216_midmonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=)
---

As I travel across the district, I hear time and again that people are tired of being forgotten by D.C. politicians.

At each campaign event, whether a large rally with presidential candidates or a small meeting with voters at a library, legion hall, or community center, I listen and take to heart every concern brought up. I do my best to tell people -- and show them -- why I will be the kind of representative we need.

**We need to keep showing up from now through Election Day, but we need Sue back on the road.**

**[Please, pitch in $5 or more today so we can ride strong in Sioux City Sue, hitting every stop and building momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932275/133643156/-690034814?refcode=em19_191216_midmonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=)**

Standing Tall for All,

\-- J.D.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932276/133643160/-690034814?refcode=em19_191216_midmonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=)

You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932277/133643161/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=&emci=b5abab69-cc1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=7610e407-4720-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12932278/133643163/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZTQwNy00NzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maahf1I0O9vXyNsdAab-Vsl0p2_ZbY1DO82RB5wQmb0=&emci=b5abab69-cc1d-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=7610e407-4720-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell hands the keys of the Senate trial to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Mitch McConnell just vowed there will be "total coordination" with the White House once the impeachment trial reaches the Senate. Imagine a judge in a normal criminal trial being okay with jurors announcing before opening arguments that they'd be taking orders from the defense attorney \-- and then imagine it's one of the most important trials in history. McConnell cares more about achieving his hyper-partisan agenda than safeguarding American democracy and strengthening the American people's faith in our government to check itself before it wrecks itself. Sadly, we know Mitch doesn't care what the voters think \-- he only cares about continuing his reign of hypocrisy and stonewalling in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think about Mitch so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4c/6e9863e8/17282411/1db0b69a/1966806975/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dGcoH38k") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4c/6e9863e8/17282411/1db0b69a/1966806975/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dGcoH38k") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4c/6e9863e8/17282411/1db0b698/1966806975/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191216a.ND&refcode2=vClR6ERmPPfb76bxfoe7")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We need your help to set the record straight with Maine voters after both Susan Collins AND Mitch McConnell launched attack ads against us.
body:
We're being attacked.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fde/4bef7a87/6a45bb34/287feae4/2683008550/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**FIRST** Susan Collins went up with an attack ad against us.
**THEN** Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans launched attack ads too.
**NOW** We need your help to set the record straight with Maine voters before it's too late. **[Rush a $3 contribution now to help us fight back->](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fde/4bef7a87/6a45bb34/287feafb/2683008550/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191216-1-full")**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fde/4bef7a87/6a45bb34/287feafb/2683008550/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191216-1-full")
Our ability to fight back against Republican attack ads depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts.
So really, thanks in advance for making a contribution to help us set the record straight.
We can't do this without you.
\- Team Sara

name: Team Yang
subject: Want to watch Star Wars with Andrew after the debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
You only have until TONIGHT at midnight to enter!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB) Yang Gang --

Ever wanted to meet Andrew? Ever wondered what Andrew was thinking right after a debate? Here’s your chance!

Andrew will be watching _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ with one lucky winner and their friend on Thursday, December 19, right after the Los Angeles debate. (Plus, the flight and hotel stay is on us!)

Chip in any amount now and be automatically entered for a chance to join Andrew in Los Angeles. [But you have to enter by TONIGHT at 11:59 PM ET. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=8&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=15&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
Here’s what you could win:

* Roundtrip airfare for you and a friend to Los Angeles, CA.
* One night hotel stay in Los Angeles.
* _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ screening with Andrew right after the debate.
* Fun stories to write home about.

The debate is just around the corner, so hurry and enter by tonight. Chip in any amount below and be automatically entered for a chance to watch _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ with Andrew.
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=14&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19913?t=9&amount=25&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---
Andrew can’t wait to meet you!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19914?t=2&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. All contributions are strictly voluntary, and contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Friends of Andrew Yang through this page. Alternatively, you may enter the promotion by completing the form found [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-starwars-giveaway?source=rules?source=ay-email-footer&t=3&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB)

The Promotion begins on December 16, 2019 at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on December 16, 2019 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time (the "Promotional Period"). All entries must be received within the Promotional Period to be eligible to win a prize. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and overnight accommodations for two guests as well as lunch with Andrew Yang. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia. Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Terms and Conditions. Promotion subject to Official Terms and Conditions and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19848?t=4&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB) for full details and Official Terms and Conditions.

Sponsor: Friends of Andrew Yang, Friends of Andrew Yang, P.O. Box 214, Midtown Station, New York, NY 10018

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=5&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=4781%2E377263%2EasRQwB) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

This is a grassroots movement, and we all need to commit to the fight for big, structural change. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b3de/45c30650/1131d7603/66fb12d7/1038122888/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

As the last fundraising deadline before people start voting, this month's FEC deadline is one of the most important tests our movement has ever faced.

Not only do we need to finish the year strong so we have the resources to turn out the vote in every single community in 2020, but the number we put up will also show the pundits and skeptics just how strong our movement is. That's why we need every single supporter to take action now -- **and that starts with you!**

**[Can you chip in $2 or anything you can today to help close out 2020 on a strong note and carry our movement all the way into the White House?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b3de/45c30650/1131d7603/66fb12d6/1038122888/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY1Rl9FR1JfR09MX1FfMjAxOTEyMTZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM65F_EGR_GOL_Q_20191216_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Everyone's heard about Elizabeth's plans, but they won't happen without your support. This is a grassroots movement, and we all need to commit to the fight for big, structural change.

Together, we can root out corruption in Washington, provide universal child care and Pre-K for every family in America, defeat the climate crisis, and much more.

But whether or not we can win in 2020 and put these plans into action depends on hitting our fundraising goals. That's why it's so important to get back on track right now, and why we're asking for your help today.

**[Please chip in $2 or anything you 're able to so we can get back on track to hitting our end of month goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b3de/45c30650/1131d7603/66fb12d6/1038122888/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY1Rl9FR1JfR09MX1FfMjAxOTEyMTZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM65F_EGR_GOL_Q_20191216_V1S2_P")**

Team Warren

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Retired FBI Official: Comey Was Disgrace to FBI, Falsely Claims IG Report Clears Him
body:
"The disgraced and sanctimonious Comey has reached new pinnacles of hubris and partisanship." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d92172de3e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Retired FBI Official: Comey Was Disgrace to FBI, Falsely Claims IG Report Clears Him**

“The disgraced and sanctimonious Comey has reached new pinnacles of hubris and partisanship. The truth is that his tenure [at] the FBI will live in infamy for the abuses outlined in the inspector general’s report and for inserting this venerable institution directly into politics and partisanship,” retired FBI Assistant Director Chris Swecker writes.

The Horowitz report revealed that former FBI Director James Comey and his team “used a dossier (really a collection of memos) paid for by a political opponent that contained ‘unsupported’ and erroneous third-hand information from unidentified sources of unknown reliability” to get permission to wiretap a presidential campaign.

“This should terrify all Americans, regardless of their politics.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb7401a964&e=3ee4985eea)

**The truth:** [Comey Says He Was ‘Wrong’ About FBI’s Surveillance Abuse](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3844645dd1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democrats have adulterated the impeachment process. They don’t have the facts. They don’t have the law. So they have manipulated the process in an obscene way to advance their obsession to impeach President Trump based solely on their opposition to him and his policies – not because he has done anything wrong,” Rep. Andy Biggs writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3581a37bc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump basked in a warm round of applause from the crowd as he arrived on the field at the 120th Army-Navy football game in Philadelphia Saturday. Trump clapped and waved to the midshipmen and cadets in the stands, then presided over the coin toss at midfield,” Mary Kay Linge reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ed061c84f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “At this point, every American concerned about economic growth and prosperity should be cheered by President Trump’s great achievement with the USMCA and China deal. Every American should be equally appalled by a hyper-partisan impeachment process,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4202498db&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Income inequality is plummeting in the blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy. “From the start of the current expansion to December 2016, average wage growth for workers lagged that of managers. Those without a college degree lagged that of college graduates, and African Americans lagged that of white Americans. Since Trump took office, each of these trends has been reversed,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Director of the Council of Economic Advisers Tomas Philipson write in the [_Miami Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7e9d23957&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1aafbaba6a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eef2c003d1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=adc021c9af)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We're ready for what's ahead -- and excited for what's to come.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/1?t=3&akid=8014%2E868730%2Ed-uQa_) Friend, I want to start off by saying one thing right up top: Thank you. Because of your generosity, we hit our $50,000 fundraising goal right before the legislative fundraising freeze Friday at midnight. That's an incredible show of grassroots support, because every single bit of it came from small donations from folks like you. I know it's so hard this time of year to find an extra few dollars to support a campaign, but I'm so grateful to every single person who chipped in -- we're now prepared to come out of this freeze stronger than ever, especially with all the progress we hope to make in Olympia this session. I'm looking forward to keeping you updated on that progress in the coming months -- but until then, I wish you and your family a truly happy holiday season. Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8014%2E868730%2Ed-uQa_). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8bd/3eb3e2fc/691408e0/744eebdc/291647020/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8bd/3eb3e2fc/691408e0/744eebdb/291647020/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8bd/3eb3e2fc/691408e0/744eebda/291647020/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:
The 2020 elections are less than a year away and if Mark isn't reelected to the Senate we could lose our hard-earned progress.
|
---
**Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2019 Online Donor Status: PENDING
[BECOME A 2019 DONOR HERE >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89fffa/1495818155/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=__392__&refcode2=statusbar")**

| | Derek --

Last month's Democratic victories in Virginia were a _huge_ step forward for our Commonwealth. But the fight for Virginia isn't over -- the 2020 elections are _less than a year away_ and if Mark isn't reelected to the Senate we could lose our hard-earned progress. **And right now our fundraising is on a worrying downward trend.**

**To get our campaign back on track we need 1,500 new donors to contribute. Will you pitch in right now to help us get there?** | **Goal: 1,500 new donors
Days left: 2
2019 Online donor status: INACTIVE [(become a donor now)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89fff9/1495818155/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89ffe6/1495818155/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89ffe5/1495818155/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89ffe4/1495818155/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89ffe3/1495818155/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
I'll be honest: this dip in fundraising is coming at a _really_ bad time. Now is when we need to be ramping _up_ our fundraising. Multiple Republican candidates have already started their campaigns to challenge Mark so now is when we need to be building momentum all across Virginia.

Mark will be the only state-wide Virginia Democrat on the ballot in 2020 so having a strong campaign won't only help his reelection but will also lift up Democrats in local elections. **We need a big boost right now so we can head into 2020 firing on all cylinders, ready to take on whatever our Republican opponents throw at us!**

**[Can we count you in? Will you be one of the 1,500 new donors we need to make sure we keep Mark in the Senate and that we keep Virginia blue in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d734/53d9897e/5392d060/1c89ffe2/1495818155/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_2_nd__392__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thanks,

Bruce Sinclair
Campaign Manager

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Mitch McConnell must do his job and stop blocking us from lowering prescription drug costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/T6w3qGQpQ3BAs1t4RPN0kYVMPvHL3kL7MwowIQ8YgI4=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191216email)
---
[**SIGN ON: Demand the Senate Act NOW to Lower Prescription Drug Prices! ⇨**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/X648UyivKMBiYd8uV5DSfdSarFrvmosV6SttemXflc0=) Team, I'm writing to you about something very personal to me: lowering the price of prescription drugs. When I was 18, my father got cancer, and within a year he had maxed out our lifetime insurance coverage. When he passed away, my mother, myself, and 3 younger siblings were left in mountains of debt. I never want anyone to go bankrupt again because of cancer medication costs, or be forced to pay 10 times more for a heart medication because a company knows they can jack up the price, or die because they had to ration their insulin. The current system is stacked against middle class families like mine. That's why I'm proud that the House of Representatives voted last week to pass a bill that would lower the price of life-saving medicines. I know it can help so many families -- families like mine -- and ensure that they won't have to go through what ours did when my father passed. But this bill, like so many others, has just been added to the graveyard of legislation waiting on Mitch McConnell's desk, never to be voted on. He is literally playing politics with people's lives. [**If you believe that lowering prescription drug costs matters, and that our entire country can 't afford the high cost of medication today, add your name now, and tell Mitch McConnell to bring this bill up for a vote!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/X648UyivKMBiYd8uV5DSfdSarFrvmosV6SttemXflc0=) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/X648UyivKMBiYd8uV5DSfdSarFrvmosV6SttemXflc0=)**
---
Team, no family should have to choose between life-saving medication or putting food on their table -- and this bill ensures that no one will have to.
I'm running for Congress to make a positive change for our families and communities. This legislation will do just that. Don't let the Mitch McConnell take our families' health hostage to partisan politics. [**Add your name right now to join me and tell the Senate Majority Leader: Do your job and bring this bill up for a vote.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/X648UyivKMBiYd8uV5DSfdSarFrvmosV6SttemXflc0=)
| **[SIGN ON ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZPL0eCUy1RiHS-wd6AVxasvS_zWG_aCFycZD2KKmrl4=/X648UyivKMBiYd8uV5DSfdSarFrvmosV6SttemXflc0=)**
---
In solidarity,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

clean_body: = Team, I'm writing to you about something very personal to me: lowering the price of prescription drugs. When I was 18, my father got cancer, and within a year he had maxed out our lifetime insurance coverage. When he passed away, my mother, myself, and 3 younger siblings were left in mountains of debt. I never want anyone to go bankrupt again because of cancer medication costs, or be forced to pay 10 times more for a heart medication because a company knows they can jack up the price, or die because they had to ration their insulin. The current system is stacked against middle class families like mine. That's why I'm proud that the House of Representatives voted last week to pass a bill that would lower the price of life-saving medicines. I know it can help so many families -- families like mine -- and ensure that they won't have to go through what ours did when my father passed. But this bill, like so many others, has just been added to the graveyard of legislation waiting on Mitch McConnell's desk, never to be voted on. He is literally playing politics with people's lives. = | | = Team, no family should have to choose between life-saving medication or putting food on their table -- and this bill ensures that no one will have to. I'm running for Congress to make a positive change for our families and communities. This legislation will do just that. Don't let the Mitch McConnell take our families' health hostage to partisan politics. = | = In solidarity, Sri Preston Kulkarni | STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = = | Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to longer receive emails from us, please =.

body:
Texas is winnable (and the DSCC agrees).

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4b/2503544812/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **_Endorsement Alert_ **

Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
Endorses MJ Hegar!

[Pitch in now to help win the nation's biggest battleground state >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4a/2503544812/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
This is big, Peter!

The DSCC, the national committee responsible for electing Democrats to the U.S. Senate, is all-in for MJ. Texas is the biggest battleground state, and _Roll Call_ has ranked Sen. Cornyn as one of the **ten most vulnerable senators**. But to beat him, it'll take a Texas tough candidate like MJ -- along with the support of every single person who is ready to win this Senate seat!
**Will you pitch in to help elect combat veteran and working mom MJ Hegar, and defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4f/2503544812/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4e/2503544812/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4d/2503544812/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__")**
Americans are ready for a senator who will fight for us no matter what, instead of selling us out to the highest special interest bidder. From facing down the Taliban to taking on the Pentagon to opening ground combat roles to women, MJ knows how to win tough fights. And this one is no exception.

The path to a new Senate -- one that protects our health care, tackles climate change, and finally passes immigration reform -- runs straight through Texas. **[If you're ready to send MJ to fight for us in that new Senate, donate today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4a/2503544812/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ needs you fighting by her side. 2020 is around the corner and **early voting in the Texas primary starts in less than 70 days.** The DSCC knows MJ is the best candidate to take on Senator Cornyn and _The Hill_ reported that MJ is leading the Democratic pack -- but there are still a lot of undecided voters so it's critical we have the resources to reach them. **[Can you pitch in today to help build the Texas-sized campaign we'll need to win?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4a/2503544812/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906d7/7f51f7bc/4a796fb9/4ef0ef4a/2503544812/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endorsement?refcode=email_20191216.2nd__638__&amount=10&recurring=true")
\-- Team MJ

Peter,

I knew this year would fly by.

In just a couple weeks, we will ring in the new year and then it’s official: campaign season is in full swing!

The left is going to be more prepared than ever. They’re hyped up on their impeachment hearings and media appearances and they’re taking EVERY opportunity to sell their far left, socialist agenda to the American people.

We need to be prepared to stand up! **That's why I wanted to personally invite you to be an exclusive 2020 FOUNDING MEMBER of my campaign by making a contribution today. **
[ **BECOME AN EARLY SUPPORTER: $10** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=c6bdb3764e254abe948dd4a03d2b465f&_e=QYfbZJ9e_LFbcFFjAjddLOL8cvcEFaUFogYo58lUL9zu106g1Lawl28zx2knmT9ziavvjtK1rZWC2RwNu5K8BXPmso_zlIWEjjcNvVr3jylEcN1PN1GYRoHibhSAAZaZv_5LGHanLTjffvqkDdCRa-GLaNbPQ9N7fFJQqvGEYTWIwwGrej1Dd3UUPD3P5PYea9ju7mwtYjOEWQqBps0mPzSRMG6YETfQySPRIlrqFAvznT6yDmds6fWA8QUw33LdeaYUnZ24QVLgtryRnymg_dY0POFwrexuZyk7KElBLETS5mMr1Ph3p9MUN5OrIP4eb9MJUhvFBFYLqsYTXpbvnl5hwM_2ig1gstXkek2xM8KeAOK2pIF9oVEWMESaXQrDz892rlqiMu8FK80Nejz7LfQoGlClgoLknHhcgWRfs_9dRAefjO5iObhFHLAilsUt)
I have spent my entire career standing up to and exposing corrupt banana republic dictators around the world. Now, we’re facing politicians who want to bring that corruption to America.

It’s unbelievable to witness. They peddle the EXACT same radical, socialist agenda that has ruined countries from which many of us escaped.

**All while so called “leaders” like Donna Shalala stand by.**

It’s clear that we cannot afford to lose in 2020. It’s not just politics, it’s about the future of our entire nation.

I want to save America from socialist destruction, Peter, and I need supporters like you to join me now as we head into this VERY important election year.

**[>>Yes, I will be an early supporter >> ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=c6bdb3764e254abe948dd4a03d2b465f&_e=QYfbZJ9e_LFbcFFjAjddLOL8cvcEFaUFogYo58lUL9zu106g1Lawl28zx2knmT9zfeiIcPt3BPCStiflLRg54hzjEBylacvoFSxfIDPsnxKz01Z7sBa2H-7Q_IwZzyOc50fnuzSq8-4ZQGosclOOKGMfOSKk7jNa0d17aCH65yMgZ8awdI-PEYQE7-UHZ_EDscFS5V4Y87vXwKOm1bhlTAMCiM25--WFVzQOjeZh1TlTnW20d2WWvH6b0NrIG11twbV7qpzQFtccSIZxFeqHw1THOw157l_KhNt0w3uxflOV8fpTxEyx7lKBOdFQqDDzYt3WbVVP7F6L-1xpqp0zWPT1QTmox1hdQqAXOJjPAJIDvt1QUvZ9d_zWRJ02NM2pFxnU5VK0nro5fLGvVoxavzdGt2_YzHIT7vKH6HMQaOQ%3D)**

Peter, not everyone will be able to join me today, but I know you're among the most committed supporters. I'm really counting on you as we prepare for a tough fight.

Thank you,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We want lower prescription prices. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, It's no secret that Americans pay far too much for healthcare. Hospitals charge new moms to hold their babies, ambulance rides can cost thousands of dollars, and insulin can be more than some people's rents. It's also no secret that Republicans don't care to fix the system because they take millions from the pharmaceutical and health insurance companies profiting off of our pain. House Democrats just passed H.R. 3, which would allow Medicare and Medicaid to lower drug prices through negotiation and create price caps for prescription drugs so that Americans don't pay exorbitant prices. It's a critical first step toward helping make the system more fair, but the bill is now in the Senate, where Mitch McConnell has said he will never let it come to a vote. [**If you agree that we need lower prescription drug prices, add your name to ours and call on the Senate to pass H.R. 3!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4d/6e9863e8/172a0b8c/1db0b69d/925071458/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/prescription-drug-prices-senate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4d/6e9863e8/172a0b8c/1db0b69d/925071458/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/prescription-drug-prices-senate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: It wasn't easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I have an important question to ask you ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline coming up in a few weeks. I hope you'll grant me a few minutes to explain why this is so important. Thanks in advance. I didn't take the usual path to public office. I worked as a geologist then became a brewer and small business owner whose successful brewpub was a part of the revitalization of a neglected warehouse district in Denver. Then, I ran for mayor and eventually governor, creating jobs here in Colorado and getting things done that mattered for people by bringing folks together around our common values. It wasn't easy then, and I know it won't be easy now -- not with the bickering and partisanship in Washington. But I know we can do it again if we win this election the right way. **My Republican opponent in this race is backed by Mitch McConnell 's network of right-wing billionaire donors who are going to do everything they can to tear us down. We can't let them get away with it.** So, as we approach our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we're looking to raise $500,000 from as many grassroots donors as possible in the next few weeks. [**Will you make a donation of $10 or more toward our December fundraising deadline today? The amount you donate honestly isn 't as important as the act of donating, which is a declaration of your support for the kind of campaign we're running.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191216-mm?refcode=em-191216-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191216-mm?refcode=em-191216-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") I'm ready to get to work in Washington -- fighting to lower our health care costs, safeguard families from gun violence, and combat climate change. But first, we need to win this race. I'm up for that challenge, and I need to know you're with me, team. Thanks for stepping up and for all you do. -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191216-mm?refcode=em-191216-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Tina Smith
subject: I don't enjoy this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The only reason we were able to hold our own against special interests and GOP mega-donors to win our race last year was because of you. So, I'm turning to you again.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191216-least?refcode=em191216-least&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

Fundraising is my least favorite part of this job, but I am going to have to ask you to make a donation before midnight. I hope you will give me a chance to explain.

I don't ask for your hard-earned dollars because I enjoy it. I do it because Republicans are spending outrageous sums of money to maintain their stranglehold on the Senate, and the only chance we have to keep Minnesota blue and flip the majority is by collecting small-dollar contributions from a whole lot of folks like you.

The only reason we were able to hold our own against special interests and GOP mega-donors to win our race last year was because of you. So, I'm turning to you again:

**Will you add a donation of $10 or more to help us meet our important fundraising deadline at midnight? Every dollar you give allows me to spend more time focused on winning re-election and less time worrying about fundraising. This is important.
