name: Booker HQ
subject: LAST CHANCE to get your name on our new bus!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, We're putting the finishing touches on our brand new bus, and we wanted to make sure your name was included before Cory sees the final product later this week. **[Today is the LAST DAY to contribute and have your name added to our new (moving!) donor wall. Donate before 8:00 p.m. ET tonight and we'll put your name on the bus.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191216_BHQ_20191216-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We can't wait for Cory to see this,
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_
Team, My name is Mike Frosolone. I'm Cory's state director out here in Iowa. I'd like to share something with you that I think is pretty cool. First, here's a quick update on what's been happening on the ground. The enthusiasm for Cory in Iowa has been off the charts. Last weekend, we welcomed Cory back to Iowa for a whirlwind of a trip that took him to 12 different counties in only four days. **Over those few days, we received so many new supporters that we actually ran out of commit-to-caucus cards!** We're excited that Cory will be coming back to Iowa again very soon. And this time, he'll have a slick new ride as we travel around the state. Check out this brand new bus that Cory will be riding around in when he's back in a few days: [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191216_BHQ_20191216-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **It looks awesome, right? Well, your name could be on it.[If you donate by Monday, December 16th at 8:00 p.m., we'll put your name on the bus. It's the least we can do to recognize our biggest supporters.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191216_BHQ_20191216-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory hasn't seen the bus yet, but I can't wait for the look on his face when he's able to see it for the first time. **Will he see your name on the bus when he 's back here in Iowa? [Chip in now to secure your spot on Cory's new ride.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191216_BHQ_20191216-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for being on this team. Mike Mike Frosolone
Iowa State Director
Cory for Iowa [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191216_BHQ_20191216-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c97bb/3988363691/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c97ba/3988363691/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c97b9/3988363691/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c97b8/3988363691/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c9787/3988363691/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c03/5fca0d19/78400783/291c97bb/3988363691/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Less than one year away...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
While Anthony Brindisi and House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump, they’re stalling an important trade deal that could help... | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d7046483575b4bfaa03759e509dcfa61&_e=45fGF3CtZp-9sy_kBvxf2WQeFkoRiLbIqkeNkc0LwhcyFCfzXQL9hSNdQwK0X8enhwzYaakcPXn-eHS28p2blZojl-X8DImHQCbwefwLTjq73NlLfN9x4l-O-jRHcfbVu_DdvebLBjJC3js90boFwMF829P5-htgaRQz_ZsUxjo0fENag-CfcsVfsz6czlp-fuqVVrIGuq8pcD3w8q20wf1vjpphH7j4YQo6beB2eM-sNS0VN-6l7E4NegvLaiojtLw8p6FiXJHAwb-se3SpdfKjKSKm5wPZgAVDnY5s_es9jZjEIjspCcO9vdkESVe_rV8BgHURJQi65rYyt3HlnNvV2Igvur5VG_HGj6j4Q_AskNllFzEdoG7Bw7BiHx7N7F_4HnlMyWulXEhmeLREyY1UoivLSJ-rkNSM3lHvP6mNKMqLNYD-d30Fh5w6uc8c)
|
---
Peter,

An important trade deal is being held up in Congress because House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump instead of fighting for Upstate New York.

The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) would help level the playing field for our state’s agriculture industry. Our district is suffering while Anthony Brindisi and the other members of the radical Left are too busy focusing on their partisan attacks on the president.

**Add your name to tell them it’s time to pass USMCA now!**
[ **PASS USMCA NOW!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d7046483575b4bfaa03759e509dcfa61&_e=45fGF3CtZp-9sy_kBvxf2WQeFkoRiLbIqkeNkc0LwhcyFCfzXQL9hSNdQwK0X8enhwzYaakcPXn-eHS28p2blZojl-X8DImHQCbwefwLTjq73NlLfN9x4l-O-jRHcfbVu_DdvebLBjJC3js90boFwMF829P5-htgaRQz_ZsUxjo0fENag-CfcsVfsz6czlp-fuqVVrIGuq8pcD3w8q20wf1vjpphH7j4YQo6beB2eM8_fgwY192wx6djwrdq9N7lefVbdgLn8CKX9_Z9c7gu1_OoBfazW-GyxU0MxZzNbsUFr8Y2Vg6xdRFufXWNMiaGKKsSoBaD9Yeh2AsrXX0bGq-VRz_FYtABZwNcg--H827yZRsCyaBMqKHUvZ4_nm5gW7rd-db-e7dVRimAeEKL1ZLRFtClVrAEZnoMJZC9Xy01SLPchfft3HW9I-kF-mR7)
Upstate New York’s small businesses are under attack from foreign competitors. Without the USMCA:
* New York’s dairy farmers will lose access to Canada’s market, and be forced to compete with their unfair milk pricing standards
* New York’s auto workers will have to compete with cheap labor from Mexico where the typical worker earns only $2 to $3 an hour
* New York manufacturers could be forced to pay a minimum of $192 million to $1.5 billion in extra taxes when exporting to Canada and Mexico
* The U.S. will lose approximately 176,000 new jobs

We need to help them compete in the world market and continue to fight for Upstate New York’s small business community.

**Will you take a stand for Upstate New York’s small businesses?**
[ **FIGHT FOR SMALL BUSINESSES** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d7046483575b4bfaa03759e509dcfa61&_e=45fGF3CtZp-9sy_kBvxf2WQeFkoRiLbIqkeNkc0LwhcyFCfzXQL9hSNdQwK0X8enhwzYaakcPXn-eHS28p2blZojl-X8DImHQCbwefwLTjq73NlLfN9x4l-O-jRHcfbVu_DdvebLBjJC3js90boFwMF829P5-htgaRQz_ZsUxjo0fENag-CfcsVfsz6czlp-fuqVVrIGuq8pcD3w8q20wf1vjpphH7j4YQo6beB2eM8iJaeDGdZ60fcOtvsRGpx6kXbuI00qZlZLcY1B7tD7P5z2gPnk4YjenJIRk7at2ahvllwfscZMelecCL0kz5YTAr2PS3RMiGkLco0eYo86fBUDbqowglLQi7kzQzoJu2RVBFzGsCrwTCGARrcEsE2r2OXhYap70hlh9a1rhTFPJiORsFTTCKBPcLS4PqtMyarkBiaM7Mdur3oVQgmomLBt)
Peter, I’m sick of Washington liberals and career politicians putting their needs ahead of ours. **Our small businesses are closing left and right, but Anthony Brindisi only cares about this media circus of an impeachment inquiry.**

**[I need you to add your name and tell Anthony Brindisi it’s time to pass USMCA now!](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d7046483575b4bfaa03759e509dcfa61&_e=45fGF3CtZp-9sy_kBvxf2WQeFkoRiLbIqkeNkc0LwhcyFCfzXQL9hSNdQwK0X8enhwzYaakcPXn-eHS28p2blZojl-X8DImHQCbwefwLTjq73NlLfN9x4l-O-jRHcfbVu_DdvebLBjJC3js90boFwMF829P5-htgaRQz_ZsUxjo0fENag-CfcsVfsz6czlp-fuqVVrIGuq8pcD3w8q20wf1vjpphH7j4YQo6beB2eM-1ZPYZc8-gFOki6mU04xCkbP6wXdBYwf0NZBE0UGUyMI2QC9VPFVgTA6Uklqc3Z6ZmST0bsf4mJrzZZhkDbfmT_ekh4zaZEj8IRcXnm3TuyzBW5b6nQGoqWU9fOEnoRb1DE6rBpzYWQazQcL0dCRrJIyWJ2TYxQ1jL2npFcsOhx3rGs355AbIbIKcMGDCH4JCqZ-3lynRd3xz9Aj5zKtPP)**

Thank you,

Claudia Tenney
---

clean_body: "" "" Team -- WMUR is reporting that Donald Trump is planning a trip to New Hampshire to rally Republican voters and defeat Democrats like Senator Jeanne Shaheen. We can 't win back the Senate without reelecting Jeanne, so we told her we'd help raise $10,000 TODAY to help her stop Trump's momentum. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Trump's trip to New Hampshire is a clear signal that Republicans see a path to unseating Granite State Democrats. With the future of the Supreme Court and action on important issues like climate change and gun safety riding on this seat, we can't afford for Republicans to pick up any momentum. That's why your donation to help reelect Jeanne -- today -- is so important. "" Thank you. Team Maggie ""

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I have a question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Share what’s on your mind

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa) Yang Gang --

Holy Cow! We just ended our Iowa bus tour and it was an amazing experience. We talked with so many voters and every event we had was packed!

One thing I’ve learned from spending so much time on the road and speaking with Americans across the country is that everyone who supports this campaign does so for their own reasons.

**[The truth is, Humanity First means something different to everyone. So I want to hear from you: Will you tell me what Humanity First means to you? ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-first-20191216?source=email-20191216MID-all&t=6&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa)** | [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-humanity-first-20191216?source=email-20191216MID-all&t=7&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa)
---
Though I’ve been spending most of my time these days in early primary states like Iowa and New Hampshire, I’m running for president of the whole country. That means whether you live in an early primary state or not, your voice matters.

Thanks for sharing what Humanity First means to you,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20024?t=2&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4850%2E377263%2EtCktPa) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Donald Trump goes on a misogynistic, unhinged rant at campaign rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Last week, while the House drew up articles of impeachment condemning Trump's many abuses of power, the president was busy rallying his base and spewing hate to win a swing state. At a rally in Pennsylvania, he lied about the border wall, trashed the FBI for investigating him, said Sen. Elizabeth Warren had a "fresh mouth," and came close to encouraging violence against the Democrats in the House investigating him. It's obvious the destruction Trump is causing this country will not end as long as he is in office, so we are calling Trump to resign \-- for the good of our country, for the good of our democracy, and for the good of our future. We need 10,000 people to join us today, so if you agree with us, please add your name here: [**Demand Donald Trump resign >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4f/6e9863e8/1727aca8/1db0b13d/3481565212/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/4bX7K8tY") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. subject: On Morning Joe this morning...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | This morning I appeared on MSNBC's Morning Joe to have a conversation about our party's nominating process. We talked about how, as a party that values inclusion, diversity, and participation, Democrats should be willing to tell the truth about our primaries. **Starting our nominating process in Iowa and New Hampshire just doesn 't make sense--and it's time for a change.** **Even Joe Scarborough agrees: the Democratic Party and nation have changed a lot since 1972 and we need to match our party's diversity.** [Donate Today >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8be/3eb3e2fc/6919d37c/744ef4ab/1540815971/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+Today+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all") **If we 're going to live our values as Democrats, we need to speak honestly.** While Iowa and New Hampshire voters have been dedicated and thoughtful partners in the nominating process, the truth is we need to change how we elect a nominee. The candidate who takes on Trump will need to bring people together from all backgrounds and tell the truth at a time when Trump is setting records for lying. This campaign has done just that. **We will continue to lift up the voices of vulnerable people and those that are too often ignored. We will continue to address our biggest problems, and we will keep speaking the truth. ** [Join our campaign now: No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8be/3eb3e2fc/6919d37c/744ef490/1540815971/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8be/3eb3e2fc/6919d37c/744ef49f/1540815971/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8be/3eb3e2fc/6919d37c/744ef49e/1540815971/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Helping us understand why you’re with Tom and what matters to you will help us keep this campaign’s progress going.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBmO6SGjHivmhLpfa-2Ff3dyX9SQa4g1DTg6aElbBDTqdtgkSw-2F4dCX-2BVoaVAcxin7IqQ3150wkvH6WEbBhMZ-2B8K4JavteL8oKoRm4IfCA718PkOEPavVAfj5HRwJD6rYwSHVW-2FW0bPraun9xRFK1EpNzmUhSDUcxPEzGe9UMnfW2NqTRlk8-2B2vZECp1bItT7olV-2FcuQRcqB4M1ReODB27NPKxWMT1r9uVhd-2Bik7AGnYlon_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc3Rxpx9m8p0Y6L2-2F82nHl88nCbrTeJLxaJ40q4yPxPUJXvie36jvHux-2BLK51PQxRgauvJbsB3qiJ92sbxP-2BFRR0yk8fBOM2zpg1RoQfIkXWo77ZhSib7vs5eSa-2FV4Ha8HMZbhjVbGQLWyDcDhXULeaE58rcnPO1oPTYpETtdh3-2Fv8GYy4zQGo-2FypleJmy22XG10rxrJtWz1Y56NKxSn-2FoCOlpeAEUnm6YE1oXvNPxbLgEXCjOoN7KTJilfepnuyELGRM6YgELxsThgVJdKZp-2BtF68AU1eDrJCX1Mxu9bUcRQENCaR7-2Ff7K-2FcUlXgmEOLHdJNwnlpihAD6tg6q06kY6mxAbnJ0s3C7H37KWyY0L5g-3D-3D) I know firsthand that Tom is the real deal — and early state voters agree with me. He’s been holding town halls and meeting with people from all walks of life, and our community organizers and volunteers are going above and beyond every single day to make sure that no door goes un-knocked, no call un-dialed, and no texts left un-sent. Talking to voters and empowering them to make the right decision for their family and their country is what organizing is all about. clean_body: | | | | 12 Days of Tom — Day 9 9% — that’s where Tom is polling in the four early voting states according to Morning Consult, friend! That means that Tom is now tied in fourth place with Mayor Pete Buttigieg in the early states — and it’s a really big deal. Tom’s continued forward momentum in this race is possible because of the strong base of grassroots support from people like you. I know firsthand that Tom is the real deal — and early state voters agree with me. He’s been holding town halls and meeting with people from all walks of life, and our community organizers and volunteers are going above and beyond every single day to make sure that no door goes un-knocked, no call un-dialed, and no texts left un-sent. Talking to voters and empowering them to make the right decision for their family and their country is what organizing is all about. As Tom spends time on the road and this campaign grows, he wants to make sure that no voices go unheard. Will you take this short survey today? | Season’s greetings! name: Sara 2020
subject: Our race moved from "leans Republican" to "toss-up" and Mitch McConnell hates it.
body:
It's essentially a coin toss.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea9e/3070059854/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
When Sara first announced her campaign, Cook Political Report had our race in the "leans Republican" column.
**Now, they 've ranked us a "toss-up."**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea9d/3070059854/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191216-2-full")
We are gaining ground because of supporters like you -- but we have a long way to go until this race is ours.
So please, chip in at this link to help Sara Gideon surge ahead:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/TossUp](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea9d/3070059854/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191216-2-full")**
Control of the Senate is at stake, so you know Mitch McConnell will spend millions on attack ads to stop our momentum and keep this seat for Susan Collins. We can't let them win that way.
Let's do this,
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea9d/3070059854/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191216-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea9c/3070059854/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea93/3070059854/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fe3/4bef7a87/6a597439/287fea92/3070059854/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
Happy Monday Peter!
Are you finding you have nothing to do this holiday season? Are you looking for something to get excited about? The Marc Flores for Congress campaign is looking for dedicated volunteers to come out every week to help call voters! Click here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/175649/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=e560e4dbec-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_16_07_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-e560e4dbec-32267927) to volunteer this Wednesday, at 5:30, and come find out how you can become a field captain!

Before folks begin their holiday travels and log off, we need to be sure we're on solid ground as we end this final fundraising quarter of 2019.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Thanks to President Trump, drug prices are actually falling
body:
President Donald J. Trump’s relentless focus on lowering drug costs is the reason Americans are seeing the... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4513739a4a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 16, 2019
---
| | |
# Thanks to President Trump, drug prices are actually falling

**President Donald J. Trump’s** relentless focus on lowering drug costs is the reason Americans are seeing the largest, most persistent drop in medicine prices in half a century.

**American healthcare** leads the world on many fronts, including crucial medical innovation that is the envy of patients around the globe. But the high price of prescription drugs has hurt both our senior citizens and working families for far too long.

**In the 8 years** before President Trump’s inauguration—while Washington focused on government takeovers of healthcare rather than on solving real-world problems—prescription drug prices continued to climb by more than 3 1⁄2 percent year-over-year. Today, prices for those drugs have seen year-over-year declines in 9 of the past 10 months.

**What changed?** The President. Rather than kick Americans off their health insurance plans or team up with socialists to plot “Medicare for All,” here are a few of the practical steps the Trump Administration took to make medicine prices more affordable:
* **Record generic approvals** : The FDA is now approving generic drugs at historic rates, generating savings for patients estimated at $26 billion.

* **Ending unacceptable pharmacy gag clauses** : President Trump signed legislation banning pharmacy [“gag clauses,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d70d2925e6&e=3ee4985eea) which prohibited pharmacists from telling patients about the best deals on the medications they need.

* **Strengthening Medicare Part D** : The Administration finalized changes to Medicare’s payment rate for certain drugs to lower expenses for seniors, as well as provided more tools to demystify out-of-pocket costs for beneficiaries.

**The result** of these and other common-sense actions: Just this past June, prescription drug prices saw their largest year-over-year decline in more than _51 years._

**Even better** , Washington is on the verge of a bipartisan breakthrough to help American patients further. Senate Democrats and Republicans have joined to craft a transformative drug pricing bill that would improve Medicare Part D, hold drug companies more accountable, and save federal taxpayers billions of dollars to boot.

**The Grassley-Wyden bill,** backed by President Trump, would significantly cut what seniors have to pay for prescription drugs. Under the proposal, for the first time ever, Medicare Part D beneficiaries would have an annual cap on their total drug expenses. The $3,100 limit on out-of-pocket costs—which works out to about $258 per month—would save many seniors _thousands_ of dollars. An inflation cap proposed under the bill would also end arbitrary and often devastating spikes in drug prices.

**Congress needs** to send drug pricing reform to President Trump’s desk this year. Americans have waited long enough. There’s just one holdup, and it’s a familiar one: House Democrats’ partisan stunts. While Congressional Republicans have tried to push ahead with bipartisan solutions, Speaker Nancy Pelosi cut a deal not with conservatives or moderates but with members of her own party’s far-left Progressive Caucus.

**The Pelosi bill** is a win for the growing Democrat-Socialist movement. It relies on a bureaucrat to dictate prices for innovative medicines and enforces it with a massive tax that would put companies out of business. The Council of Economic Advisers predicts the far-left bill could erase nearly _one-quarter_ of the anticipated gains in American life expectancy over the next decade.

**So instead** **of joining** with Senate Democrats—and Republicans in both chambers—to keep their promises to working Americans, Speaker Pelosi is backing a separate bill that is entirely partisan, unworkable, and in fact deeply harmful to Americans’ health.

**It’s no wonder** Americans want to drain the Swamp.

[The President is ready to sign a bipartisan deal. Where is Speaker Pelosi?](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1725a41c9&e=3ee4985eea)

**NEW:** [Forgotten Americans are forgotten no more](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29605a383b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: President Trump attends 120th Army–Navy game**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b17b5fe1f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **At the 120 th Army-Navy football game **on Saturday, President Trump was met with thunderous applause as he walked out onto Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia.

**Before kickoff,** the Commander in Chief stood side-by-side with representatives from both service academies, along with Defense Secretary Mark Esper, for the playing of our National Anthem. President Trump also stopped by each locker room before the game to wish players good luck in person.

[“President Donald Trump receives rousing welcome from crowd at 120th Army-Navy game”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0cc685480f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump is joined by Defense Secretary Mark Esper and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley during the 120th Army–Navy football game in Philadelphia** | November 25, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=204622bbb3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1d0f4b58a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6c8f631e87)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
